shared_attributes.scrolling: parallax or synchronized with game speed

context.role: Provides visual depth through parallax scrolling, creates desert sky atmosphere
context.screen_position: fills entire screen (600x150px), clouds at y=10-40px (random heights)
context.usage_scenario: Always visible as backdrop, clouds scroll at 0.5x Current_Speed for parallax effect

visual_specification.shape: Solid color sky with optional simple cloud sprites
visual_specification.texture: flat color for sky, minimal pixel art clouds
visual_specification.outline: none for sky, 2px outline for clouds (optional)

animation.description: Sky is static solid color. Clouds (optional) scroll right-to-left at Current_Speed * 0.5 (parallax), respawn when x < -100px

visual_specification.details: Sky: solid #F7F7F7 fill. Clouds (optional): Small 46x14px or Large 92x27px, simple shapes, spawn every 5-10 seconds at random y=10-40px, max 3 clouds on screen

relationships.shared_with: Provides atmospheric context for all game elements
relationships.differences_from: ground scrolls at 1.0x speed, background clouds scroll at 0.5x speed (parallax effect)

explicit_negations: no gradients or color blending in sky
no complex cloud shapes or details
no color variations or time-of-day changes
